title: Custom FPS Display
description: Custom your FPS display in a modern way
body:
# Custom FPS Display 

### Custom FPS Display allows you to see your FPS (in a rgb way).

You can customize the position of the FPS display as much as you want. Just use arrows to adjust its position. (see pictures) Default key is M to toggle the configuration pannel, but customizable in key settings

![Customizable position](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/184920bc94a0b25c8b0f066cc07794bf83ca4ab4_0.webp)

![Display ingame](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1577f4f994aabc018a2fdef4a5215f14fbef66a.png)

Coming soon: translations and persistent position of the configuration. (translations available on 1.21)

 
discord support server: https://discord.gg/M6bgbzEx
